assertions.title: Auth docs are English-only and non-promotional

steps.action: Searched README/docs for sponsor, referral, discount, invite-code, affiliate, and named promotional brands
Scanned README/docs for CJK characters
steps.expected: No Chinese/Japanese localized auth documentation remains

steps.action: Manually reviewed refreshed auth sections during README read
steps.observed: x.ai, Z.AI, OpenCode, and local proxy credential sections are English and factual

commands.command: rg -n -i --glob '!.git/**' --glob '!.factory/**' 'sponsor|referral|discount|promo|invite-code|invitecode|aff=|PackyCode|AICodeMirror|BmoPlus|VisionCoder|Lingtrue|packycode|aicodemirror|bmoplus|visioncoder|lingtrue' README.md docs AGENTS.md assets .github .goreleaser.yml .dockerignore .gitattributes Dockerfile docker-compose.yml
commands.observation: No matches (ripgrep exit 1 means no matches).

commands.command: python3 CJK character scan over README.md docs/**/*.md
commands.observation: No Chinese/Japanese/Korean characters found in README/docs.

commands.command: python3 non-ASCII scan over README.md docs/**/*.md
commands.observation: Broad scan found only typographic punctuation/arrows/non-breaking hyphens, not localized prose; superseded by CJK scan.

evidence.network: none - no live or local service calls performed

frictions.description: A broad non-ASCII scan reported typographic arrows/hyphens/apostrophes in README/docs even though those are not localized prose.
frictions.resolution: Ran a targeted CJK character scan for Chinese/Japanese/Korean characters and used promotional-term greps plus manual README review for the English-only/non-promotional auth-doc assertion.

summary: Tested 13 assigned assertions: all 13 passed. Validation used static repository checks only, with no services started, no fixed ports bound, and no live upstream calls.
